content: Adds the `Class.UIShadow` component, which adds drop shadows to parent UI instances.
The AssetImporter now supports an additional scaling factor when importing models and animations. The stud-to-meter conversion factor will be updated from (20:1) to (25:7).
Fixes an issue where `Class.UIShadow`'s edges appear jagged on corners with large radii.
Slightly reduces memory usage for physics constraints.
Luau now supports read-only table indexers using the syntax `{read [K]: V}` or `{V}`.
Fixes issue where skyboxes with atmosphere at times would load with lower resolution.
Fix a case where script analysis would erroneously infer `unknown` as the result of a generic function call.
`Class.AvatarEditorService:PromptSaveAvatar()` and `Class.AvatarEditorService:NoPromptSaveAvatar()` will now make sure that empty updates do not fire a request to the backend.
Fixes crash on some Light instances when changing Light.range between under 64 to equal or greater than 64.
Fixes issue where `Class.EditableImage` objects wouldn't render on a decal with PBR maps.
Fixes geometry of ball-shaped `Part` instances that are parented to the player.
Fixed cases of Explorer box select getting stuck.
Displays a proper error message when the fallback engine font doesn't load correctly.
Fixes platform replication logic when a platform is unanchored.
Adds mouse support to iPadOS.
Add more information about read-only/write-only properties to Luau type mismatch errors.
Fixes frame spikes when using high polling mice.
Updates `Class.SoundService.CharacterSoundsUseNewApi|CharacterSoundsUseNewApi` script to fix latent issue with character loading.
Fixes a bug for Chromebooks and Android devices with mice that sometimes prevented mouse buttons from working in first-person mode.
`Class.UICorner` instances placed on 9-slice images now round the image corners instead of rounding each image slice individually.
Adjusts the gamepad selection point and click algorithm to use a point on the selection outline of the current element as an origin rather than the center of the current selection.
Live Script reload now works for Parallel Luau.
SLIM support for emissive maps in `Class.SurfaceAppearance` objects.
In the New Luau Type Solver, fixed a bug that could cause Studio hangs when type checking *many* copies of the same script calling a common function.
Fix an issue where R15 elbows were slightly bent when playing blocky R15 animations (such as many defaults).
Normalize repeated slashes in rbxasset:// ContentIds.
Fix sleep behavior for simulated AnimationConstraints.
Luau's New Type Solver: function types with parameter names will retain those parameter names when passed through type functions.
ProceduralModels now show bounds exactly equal to the Size when the selection visualization is set to Box.
Fixes a bug where animations would not reset correctly in Avatar Setup.
